stories.title: All-Star Week Is One Week Away — Here's What to Watch
stories.angle: The 2026 MLB All-Star Week is one week from today. The full schedule: Home Run Derby on Netflix July 13 from Citizens Bank Park, All-Star Game on FOX July 14 at 8 PM ET. Rosters set — Dodgers, Braves and Phillies lead with 5 each. Ernie Clement (Blue Jays) led AL voting; Shohei Ohtani led all players. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. stepped down from the starting spot to rest his back. There are 26 first-time All-Stars in the full rosters. It will be the first All-Star week in Philadelphia since 1996.

article.headline: One Week to All-Star: Your Complete Guide to MLB's Midsummer Classic in Philadelphia

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
All-Star Week Is One Week Away

**Primary Image Search Terms:**
- `Citizens Bank Park`
- `MLB All-Star Game`

**Notes:** Wide exterior or interior shot of Citizens Bank Park preferred. Crowd/atmosphere shots acceptable.

research.facts:
All-Star Week Is One Week Away
**Sources:**
- MLB.com All-Star schedule page
- CBS Sports: "2026 MLB All-Star Game: Full rosters unveiled"
- ESPN: "11 stats and facts as 2026 All-Star Game rosters are revealed"
- Visit Philadelphia / MLB press releases
**Key Verified Facts (HIGH — multiple sources):**
- 2026 MLB All-Star Game: July 14, Citizens Bank Park, Philadelphia, FOX 8 PM ET
- 2026 MLB Home Run Derby: July 13, Citizens Bank Park, Netflix
- Dodgers, Braves, Phillies: 5 All-Stars each (most in MLB)
- Blue Jays, Rays, Yankees: 4 each (most in AL)
- Ernie Clement (Blue Jays): most votes in AL
- Shohei Ohtani (Dodgers): most votes overall (auto-starter, skipped Phase 2)
- 26 first-time All-Stars in 2026 rosters
- Philadelphia last hosted All-Star in 1996

stories.title: Nick Kurtz Gets His First All-Star Start
stories.angle: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. stepped aside to rest a back injury, and Oakland Athletics first baseman Nick Kurtz got the call. The 23-year-old is in just his second MLB season, and his first half has been remarkable: 20 HR, 66 RBI (AL-leading), 76 walks (AL-leading), .424 OBP, .949 OPS. Kurtz leads the AL in both RBI and walks — one of the most complete offensive players in the game. He now gets a national stage at Citizens Bank Park on July 14. The Athletics are quietly having a very good season.

article.headline: From Replacement Slot to First Starter: Nick Kurtz Is Ready for His All-Star Moment

research.facts:
Nick Kurtz Gets First All-Star Start
**Sources:**
- Yahoo Sports: "Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Passes on All-Star Game to Focus on Recovery from Back Issues"
- Clutch Points/SRN News: "A's Nick Kurtz to start All-Star Game in place of ailing Vladimir Guerrero Jr."
- Bleacher Report: "Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Declines to Participate in 2026 MLB ASG"
**Key Verified Facts (HIGH — multiple sources confirm):**
- Vladimir Guerrero Jr. declined to participate due to lower back injury/rest
- Nick Kurtz (Oakland Athletics, 23 years old) will start at 1B for AL
- This is Kurtz's first All-Star appearance — he's in his second MLB season
- Kurtz stats through ~87 games: 20 HR, 66 RBI (AL-leading), 76 walks (AL-leading), .424 OBP, .949 OPS, 61 runs (AL-leading)
- Guerrero had 6 All-Star selections prior to this year

stories.title: Jacob Misiorowski's Historic First Half — And the All-Star Question
stories.angle: The Brewers are the fastest team in franchise history to 50 wins. The man most responsible is Jacob Misiorowski, whose first half has been historically dominant: 1.45–1.50 ERA (MLB-best), 0.81 WHIP (MLB-best), 105.5 mph max velocity (Statcast era high for starters). He was selected to the All-Star Game alongside catcher William Contreras. His status for the Midsummer Classic is in doubt due to workload concerns. The Brice Turang snub adds complexity: the Brewers' best position player was passed over despite ranking No. 7 in NL bWAR.

article.headline: Jacob Misiorowski Is Putting Together One of the Best Pitching First Halves in MLB History

research.facts:
Misiorowski's Historic First Half
**Sources:**
- OnMilwaukee: "Brewers Leadoff: Milwaukee has two All-Stars and a division lead"
- Yahoo Sports: "Brewers May Never See Another Run Like Jacob Misiorowski's"
- BrewCrewBall: Misiorowski stats coverage
- Fox Sports: "Brewers Star Jacob Misiorowski's 2026 Season By The Numbers"
- Yahoo Sports: "Brewers' Jacob Misiorowski's All-Star Game Status in Doubt"
**Key Verified Facts (HIGH — multiple sources):**
- Brewers: fastest in franchise history to 50 wins; division lead
- Misiorowski ERA through 15 starts: 1.45–1.50 (MLB best, Brewers franchise history best through 15 starts)
- Misiorowski WHIP: 0.81 (MLB best)
- Misiorowski strikeouts: 146 (per prior pipeline notes; MLB leader at that point)
- Misiorowski max velocity: 105.5 mph (June 26; Statcast era high for starters)
- Misiorowski: selected to 2026 All-Star Game; All-Star status in doubt (workload/health)
- William Contreras: also selected to All-Star Game for Brewers
- Brice Turang: NOT selected despite ranking No. 7 in NL bWAR (biggest snub per multiple sources)

stories.title: Home Run Derby Preview — 6 Days Until Netflix Lights Up Citizens Bank
stories.angle: The Home Run Derby is 6 days away — July 13 at Citizens Bank Park on Netflix. Kyle Schwarber leads MLB with 30+ home runs at his home stadium. Junior Caminero (2025 runner-up) is confirmed. Bryce Harper has updated his status. The new swing-bracket format replaces the traditional Derby structure. This is the first Derby ever aired on Netflix, bringing the event to a global streaming audience. Judge is out with a rib fracture.

article.headline: Home Run Derby 2026: Schwarber, Caminero and a New Format on Netflix

image_concepts.label: Image

Home Run Derby Preview

- Bleacher Report: "Bryce Harper Updates Status for 2026 MLB Home Run Derby"
- Prior pipeline coverage confirming Schwarber 30+ HRs, Caminero confirmed, Judge out
**Key Verified Facts (HIGH — multiple prior sessions + new sources):**
- Derby date: July 13, 2026
- Location: Citizens Bank Park, Philadelphia
- Streaming: Netflix (first MLB Derby on Netflix)
- Confirmed participants: Junior Caminero (2025 runner-up), Kyle Schwarber (conditional — back/roster)
- Kyle Schwarber: MLB-leading 30+ HR as of early July at his home park
- Aaron Judge: OUT (rib fracture)
- New format: swing-bracket format (replacing traditional Derby structure)
- Bryce Harper: updated status (specifics TBD — declined to commit as of prior coverage)

stories.title: Skubal Countdown — 27 Days to the August 3 Deadline
stories.angle: The August 3 trade deadline is 27 days away. Tarik Skubal remains the biggest domino — 85% trade probability, Braves the frontrunner per Nightengale. Tigers are 38-49. The asking price: an elite prospect plus two or three top-10 prospects. What a Skubal-to-Atlanta deal looks like: he joins Chris Sale (who hit his 10th All-Star selection) in one of the most dominant 1-2 SP rotations in the league. The Dodgers are believed "not in." The Yankees are "no chance." Braves vs. the field.

article.headline: 27 Days to the Deadline: Why the Braves Are the Frontrunner for Tarik Skubal

**Key Verified Facts (HIGH/MEDIUM):**
- August 3 deadline: 27 days away from July 7
- Skubal trade probability: 85% (ESPN/Jeff Passan)
- Braves: frontrunner per Bob Nightengale (rival executives confirm)
- Dodgers: "not in" per sources
- Yankees: "no chance, none" per source
- Tigers record: 38-49
- Chris Sale: made his 10th All-Star selection (Braves)
- Asking price: elite prospect + 2-3 top-10 prospects (CC Sabathia acquisition level)
- Skubal: free agent after 2026 season; Tigers won't extend (Scott Boras client)
